subcodes.title: Words to Ida Finch and Fanny and Alma Knobloch, spoken on 1908-11-12
subcodes.first_line: The word Angel referred to in any of the Holy books does not refer to physical bodies descending from Heaven. Angel has two meanings...
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @angels, @symbolism
